team_name: NyaySetu: Bridging Court Judgments to Ground-Level Action
summary: Build an AI system that can read court judgment PDFs, extract key information, generate a structured action plan, and ensure human-verified data is presented in a dashboard for government use. The system should handle complex, inconsistent legal PDFs, outputs must be explainable and verifiable, and the focus should be on decision support, not full automation.
tech_stack: Document AI: LayoutLM (fine-tuned on Indian court documents)
LLMs: Claude API / GPT-4o (directive extraction), GPT-4 Vision / Gemini Vision (compliance verification)
Deployment: Docker + AWS EC2 / NIC Cloud
key_steps: LLM-Powered Directive Extraction and Entity Recognition
Action Card Generation and Authority Assignment
optimization_claims: Reduces the time to convert a court judgment into a structured, assigned, deadline-bound action plan from an average of 15 days (current manual process) to under 2 minutes
constraints_addressed: Must handle complex, inconsistent legal PDFs
Outputs must be explainable and verifiable
Focus on decision support, not full automation
